MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Continued To May-23-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Plaintiff Gary Mitchell'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Cross-Complainant Steven Brattesani And Or His Attorneys
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Gary Mitchell'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Cross-Complainant Steven Brattesani And Or His Attorneys.

Plaintiff's Motion to Compel is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. If defendant has not already served supplemental responses, which includes a production of documents, to each outstanding set of discovery at issue in this motion, it is ordered to do so by no later than December 4, 2017. Defendant makes clear he is not opposing the motion in substance, only the request for sanctions. Any supplemental discovery is not properly before this Court on this motion. Any deficiencies with the supplemental responses should be addressed by separate meet and confer and motion if necessary. It seems clear that plaintiff's counsel knew about defense counsel's travel plans before sending the 23-page meet and confer letter and that plaintiff's counsel knew about defense counsel' subsequent personal emergency before filing this motion. It appears that some latitude should have been granted before filing the instant motion. On the other hand, it appears only after the motion was filed, and despite the fact that the instant discovery had been pending since June 15, did defendant supplement responses and produce documents. In light of this, the request for sanctions is DENIED at this time but, if the supplemental responses prove deficient, sanctions should and will be granted.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must submit it directly to the Judge Pro Tem.

Judge Pro Tem: Vedica Puri, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)

MOTION To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Cross-Complainant Steven Brattesani And Or His Attorneys
Off Calendar Oct-25-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF GARY MITCHELL'S MOTION To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Cross-Complainant Steven Brattesani And Or His Attorneys is CONTINUED on the Court's own motion to November 14, 2017 at 9:00 AM in Department 302/Discovery. Temporary Judge Naomi Jane Gray recuses herself in this matter in the interest of justice pursuant to Cal. Code Civ. Proc. 170.1(a)(6)(i).

Judge Pro Tem: Naomi Jane Gray; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (DISC302)
